title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 365.145 - Default — discrimination, law applicable to retail installment transactions
text:
365.145.  Default — discrimination, law applicable to retail installment transactions. — Sections 408.551 to 408.562 shall apply to any retail installment transaction made pursuant to sections 365.010 to 365.160.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1170)
